bridge_equation_v13.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v13 = mean(B_plastic_v12, H_route, 1 - R_route, D_feature_v7, 1 - G_brain_v7)
bridge_equation_v13.structure_term: B_struct_v13 = mean(B_struct_v12, H_struct, 1 - R_phase, D_structure_v7, D_route_v7)
bridge_equation_v13.readiness_term: R_train_v13 = mean(R_train_v12, B_plastic_v13, B_struct_v13, A_route, D_route_align_v7, 1 - R_route)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第十三桥开始显式吸收路由退化和结构相变风险，使训练规则不只面对一般塌缩，还开始面向真实大规模在线系统里的路由退化。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第十三桥并回主核，检验主核在更真实路由退化压力下是否还能继续收口。
